title: Luckyblock without structures
description: This is a lucky block that doesn’t generate structures.
body:
# Luckyblock without structures
Datapack adds new properties to sponge.
This is a lucky block that doesn’t generate structures.
The sponge is now a lucky block.
In case of any problems, please contact me.
